name: Legends Indoor Golf
about: Legends Indoor Golf is a premier indoor golf facility in Downers Grove, IL, offering an immersive golfing experience with 9 state-of-the-art simulators. Patrons can play over 1,000 courses from around the world, including more than 100 bucket-list and iconic layouts, with options for par-3 and short courses. The venue provides a welcoming environment with food, drinks, and comfortable amenities, ideal for maintaining skills during Chicago's colder months. Operating on a seasonal basis from November to April, Legends caters to players of all abilities, offering everything from casual play to competitive leagues and corporate events.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium simulation technology with Foresight Sports GC3 and Uneekor Launch Monitors
Access to over 1,000 golf courses, including 100+ iconic and bucket-list layouts
A relaxed atmosphere with a full bar, food menu, and comfortable lounge space

food_and_drink.notes: Beer, wine, and specialty drinks served

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players must bring their own clubs as there is no club rental service mentioned.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, Legends has an in-house bar and kitchen serving beer, wine, specialty drinks, and light hot food.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A reasonable pace is just under one hour per player for 18 holes with simulated putting. Additional time may be needed for warmups.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Legends welcomes families and offers activities suitable for different skill levels, making it kid-friendly.
